query_name: 顧客ID抽出_TPマッチング_店舗顧客_ver1.0
query_string:
drop table if exists l2_verification.tmp_tp_matching_customer_list;
create table l2_verification.tmp_tp_matching_customer_list as 

with order_log as (
  select
    distinct
    customer_id
    , business_date
    , order_id
    , property_id
  from 
    _integration_datamart.cls_order_detail
  where
    customer_id in (
      select distinct customer_id from _integration_datamart.cls_order_detail 
        where time >= td_time_parse('2022-12-01', 'jst') and time <= td_time_parse('2025-12-01', 'jst')
    )
    and
    time >= td_time_parse('2024-12-01', 'jst')
    and time <= td_time_parse('2025-12-01', 'jst')
)

, agg_order_count as (
  select
    customer_id
    , property_id
    , count(distinct order_id) as order_count
    , max(business_date) as latest_business_date
  from
    order_log
  group by
    1,2
)

, agg_property_count as (
  select
    customer_id
    , count(distinct property_id) as property_count
  from
    order_log
  group by
    1
)

, agg_order_rn as (
  select
    t0.*
    , t1.property_count
    , row_number() over (partition by t0.customer_id order by order_count desc, latest_business_date desc) as order_count_rn
    , max_by(property_id, latest_business_date) over (partition by t0.customer_id) as latest_property_id
    , min(t0.order_count) over (partition by t0.customer_id) as min_order_count
    , max(t0.order_count) over (partition by t0.customer_id) as max_order_count
  from
    agg_order_count as t0
  left join
    agg_property_count as t1
    on t0.customer_id = t1.customer_id
)

, customer_shop_list as (
  select
    customer_id
    , case
        when property_count between 1 and 2 then latest_property_id
        when property_count >= 3 and (max_order_count - min_order_count) >= 5 then property_id
        when property_count >= 3 and (max_order_count - min_order_count) < 5 then latest_property_id
      end as property_id
  from
    agg_order_rn
  where
    order_count_rn = 1
    and property_count > 0
)

, prep_agg_tp_nomination as (
  select
    customer_id
    , therapist_id
    , count(distinct if(nomination_fee > 0.0, order_id)) as nomination_count
  from 
    _integration_datamart.cls_order_detail
  where
    customer_id in (
      select distinct customer_id from _integration_datamart.cls_order_detail 
        where time >= td_time_parse('2022-12-01', 'jst') and time <= td_time_parse('2025-12-01', 'jst')
    )
    and
    time >= td_time_parse('2024-12-01', 'jst')
    and time <= td_time_parse('2025-12-01', 'jst')
  group by
    1,2
)

, agg_tp_nomination as (
  select
    customer_id
    , max(nomination_count) as nomination_count
  from
    prep_agg_tp_nomination
  group by
    1
)

select
  customer_id
  , property_id as store_id__property_id
  , area_name
  , if(nomination_count >= 2, 1, 0) as flag_repeat_tp
from
  customer_shop_list
left join
  _integration_datamart.mst_shop using (property_id)
left join
  agg_tp_nomination using (customer_id)
inner join
  (select distinct customer_id from hst_weekly_customer_rf where processing_date = '2025-12-01' and f between 1 and 5) using (customer_id)
order by
  1
